title: HIKEMAN Collapsible Camp Trash Can - Reusable Pop Up Garden Bin,Yard Waste Bags for Camping,Garden,Hiking,Picnics and Outdoor (L(46*46*55cm))
features: Ultra Strong material : The garden trash can is made of high-quality Oxford cloth,strong and wear-resistant,and has a built-in thick steel ring support.
CAPACITY：The pop-up bin has a large capacity of 91L which is plenty of space for weeds,dead plants,grass and other waste material.
Convenient Handles:There are handles on the bottom and top of the can for easy carrying dumping.
Universally use：camp trash can is best choice for recyclables,Camping garbage，leaves, branches,grass and other garden waste.Helps keep campsite,recreational and other use areas clean.
COLLAPSIBLE:This camping bin is 46cm in diameter and 55cm in height.It is easily collapsible for easy storage.Lightweight and easy to carry.
description: The Camp Trash Can is a multipurpose portable collection bag,helps keep campsite,recreational and other use areas clean. The garden trash can is suitable for collecting fallen leaves,trimmed plant branches,weeds and other small debris. It can also be used to store garbage for outdoor activities and picnics. And it is foldable,compact and easy to carry. Product Dimension (unfolded):46*46*55cm. Package Content: 1 x camping bin 1 x packaging bag
